description: Perform a security audit for unsafe cross-origin links (Reverse Tabnabbing vulnerability) on https://crawler-test.com/ by identifying links with target='_blank' that are missing the rel='noopener' attribute. Export the list of identified unsafe links to ~/Documents/SEO/exports/unsafe_links.csv and record the total count of these links in a text file at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/security_summary.txt.
